title: Nucor iron oxide handling system- dus00057
content:
Project Name: Nucor iron oxide handling system- dus00057
Project code: 4019005
Client: THYSSENKRUPP INDUSTRIAL SOLUTIONS AG, Germany.
Project contract Weight: 314 Tons.
Description: Scope - Fabrication of 1 unit of Slewing Stacker with Tripper car. Fabrication & pre-assembly of steel structure, Inspection & Testing, Surface preparation and Painting, Final complete assembly of travel gear systems (all wheel bogies) Seaworthy packing and FAS delivery to Jebel Ali Port.
Location: LOUISIANA, USA
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works
Market sector: Steel manufacturing plant.
Status: Completed 2019
Duration: Jan 2019 – Aug 2019
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
